✍️

Lu Shen

Small Business Owner · AI Tools Enthusiast · Reviewer at GenAIPick

I write honest, hands-on AI tool reviews and tutorials at GenAIPick. I also build free online tools at ToolMixr. I pay for my own subscriptions, test tools for weeks before reviewing them, and tell you when something genuinely impresses me — or when it is just hype.

🔗 LinkedIn 🔗 GitHub 🔗 ToolMixr

Why I Started GenAIPick

Most AI tool reviews are either sponsored content disguised as reviews, listicles that barely scratch the surface, or written by people who have clearly not used the tools. I wanted something different: real usage, real opinions, no fluff.

My Testing Methodology

  • Minimum 2 weeks of real usage — not playing with demos, actual production work
  • Same prompts across competitors — fair, head-to-head comparisons
  • Time tracking — measuring actual productivity impact
  • Quality scoring — rating outputs against specific criteria
  • No free access for reviews — I pay for my own subscriptions

What I Cover

AI chat assistants (ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini), AI writing tools (Jasper, Grammarly), AI image generators (Midjourney, DALL-E, Flux), AI video tools (Sora, Runway, Pika), AI coding assistants (Copilot, Cursor, Windsurf), and AI business tools.

My Tools & Tech Stack

Astro.js Cloudflare Pages ChatGPT Claude GitHub Copilot Perplexity Midjourney Canva Notion

Get in Touch

Found something outdated? Want me to review a tool? Just want to say hi? Drop me a message or connect on LinkedIn.
